1: The goodness of God endureth endureth continually.
2: Like a sharp razor, working deceitfully.
3: And And lying rather than to speak righteousness. Selah. Selah.
5: He shall take thee away, and pluck thee out of thy thy dwelling place, and root thee out of the land of the living. Selah. Selah.
7: But trusted in the abundance of his riches, and and strengthened himself in his wickedness.
8: I trust in the mercy of God for ever and ever.
9: And I will wait on thy name; for it is it is good before thy saints.
